overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk through a suburban Los Santos neighborhood. The player character moves from a park visitor center through pathways, crosses a street with passing traffic, and continues along residential sidewalks past houses and street infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: park visitor center with covered walkway and flowering bushes

agents.ego_description: walking around the park building, passing flowering bushes and approaching the covered entrance

entered.detail: single-story building with red tile roof and beige stucco walls
dense green bushes with pink and white flowers
covered concrete walkway attached to the building
blue and white sign with park hours and rules

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a park visitor center building at night. The player walks around the structure, passing dense flowering bushes with pink blossoms. The area is lit by artificial light from the building and nearby street lamps, with a covered walkway providing partial shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: open park pathway with benches and street lighting

events.description: exits covered building area into open park pathway with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking along curved stone pathway through the park, passing wooden benches

entered.detail: green wooden park bench under street lamp
mature tree with thick trunk and spreading canopy

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the sheltered building area onto an open park pathway illuminated by street lamps. The path curves through grassy areas with benches placed along the side, transitioning from the built structure to the natural park environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with vehicle traffic and crosswalk

events.description: black sedan and sports car drive past on the street
crosses from park path onto asphalt road and continues to opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the street intersection, waiting for vehicles to pass, then crossing to the other side

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on
dark sports car with red accent stripes speeding past

entered.detail: paved street with yellow and white markings
white painted STOP text on road surface
low stone retaining wall along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The player exits the park and approaches a street intersection. Two vehicles—a black sedan and a sports car—drive past on the road. The player crosses the asphalt street, passing over the painted stop marking, and reaches the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with red brick walls and palm trees

events.description: turns right to follow the sidewalk along the curved residential street

agents.ego_description: walking along the suburban sidewalk, passing a yellow fire hydrant and utility boxes

entered.detail: paved pedestrian walkway with cracks and texture
yellow fire hydrant near the curb
beige electrical utility box on the grass verge
tall red brick wall with stone pillars and iron fencing
tall palm tree trunk visible against the wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along the residential sidewalk, the player passes suburban infrastructure including a yellow fire hydrant and utility boxes. The path follows a red brick wall with palm trees visible behind it, curving gently through the neighborhood.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street corner with stop sign and white walls

events.description: turns left at the street corner approaching the stop sign
car with headlights on drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the stop sign at the corner, continuing along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: car with headlights illuminated driving down the residential street

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign on metal pole
tall white concrete wall surrounding residential property

segments.scene_description: The player reaches a street corner marked by a prominent stop sign. After turning left, a car passes by on the road. The surroundings feature white concrete walls of residential properties and continued street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with parked cars and driveways

events.description: black sedan drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past residential driveways and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the street

entered.detail: residential driveway entrance with sloped curb

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued walking along the residential sidewalk past the stop sign. A black sedan drives by on the street. The path continues past driveways and parked cars, with white walls lining the properties on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the artificial glow of a park visitor center into the quiet, lamp-lit streets of a suburban neighborhood. It begins by skirting the visitor center building and its pink flowering bushes, moving from the shelter of a covered walkway onto an open park pathway lined with benches and grass. As the camera exits the park, the scene shifts to a street intersection where a black sedan and a sports car drive past before the viewer crosses the asphalt over a painted stop marking. The movement then transitions onto a residential sidewalk, passing a yellow fire hydrant and a red brick wall with palm trees before turning left at a prominent stop sign. Finally, the path continues past white concrete property walls and parked cars as another black sedan glides by under the steady hum of street lighting.
